# OpenCrabs

> Open-source AI agent that runs in your terminal. Single Rust binary. Every channel.

OpenCrabs is an autonomous AI agent built in Rust. It connects to any LLM provider (Anthropic Claude, OpenAI, Google Gemini, OpenRouter with 400+ models, MiniMax, Ollama, LM Studio), orchestrates 40+ built-in tools, and works from Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, or the built-in TUI.

## Key Features
- Multi-provider AI with fallback chain for automatic failover
- Per-provider vision model — agent tool for image understanding on any provider
- 40+ built-in tools: file ops, bash, web search, code execution, image gen, document parsing
- 3-tier persistent memory: brain files, daily logs, semantic vector search
- Cron job scheduler for recurring tasks
- Structured plans with TUI progress widget and approval workflow
- Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol gateway
- Voice: speech-to-text and text-to-speech
- Self-evolving via /evolve command

## Links
- Website: https://opencrabs.com
- Documentation: https://docs.opencrabs.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/adolfousier/opencrabs
- License: MIT
